def eligible_for_academic_excellence_award(self) -> bool:
        age_between_18_and_22 = self.age >= 18 and self.age <= 22
        is_college_education = self.education == 'college'
        high_GPA = self.GPA >= 3.9
        has_honors_courses = self.honors_courses == 'yes'
        
        return age_between_18_and_22 and is_college_education and high_GPA and has_honors_courses
